tests.name: current value updates immediately on input change
debounced value does not update immediately
starts with matching current and debounced values
renders without errors with default delay
input change to "a" updates current value
input change to "ab" updates current value
input change to "abc" updates current value
input change to "hello" updates current value
input change to "world" updates current value
input change to "test1" updates current value
input change to "test2" updates current value
input change to "foo" updates current value
input change to "bar" updates current value
input change to "baz" updates current value
input change to "query1" updates current value
input change to "query2" updates current value
input change to "search" updates current value
input change to "find" updates current value
input change to "filter" updates current value
input change to "abc123" updates current value
input change to "xyz" updates current value
input change to "new value" updates current value
input change to "updated" updates current value
input change to "final" updates current value
sequential inputs [hello,hello world,hello world!] => current="hello world!"
